arts.ttl: Liverpool seal loan signing of Sam Kerr … from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Scotland midfielder won Frauen-Bundesliga with Bayern Vows to bring ‘energy and passion’ to Matt Beard’s side Liverpool have signed Sam Kerr on loan until the end of the season. Not to be confused with Australia and Chelsea forward Sam Kerr, the midfielder joins Liverpool from Bayern Munich. Having moved to Germany from Rangers in 2023, Kerr won the Frauen-Bundesliga in her first season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man United dealt Davies blow as defender nears new deal
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool are set to suffer disappointment in their bid to sign Alphonso Davies with the defender on the verge of signing a new contract at Bayern Munich. Davies has emerged as one of 2025’s most high-profile free agents having entered the final season of his deal with Bayern. The Canada international is […] The post Liverpool and Man United dealt Davies blow as defender nears new deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand’s transfer advice for Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been given transfer advice by Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand amid ongoing rumours linking the Liverpool right-back with a move to Real Madrid . “My advice to Trent and his team would be: get that agreement done and then come out and be honest with Liverpool fans because they’ll respect you and love you more when you leave,” Ferdinand told his YouTube channel.
